method: The current library-wide audit used three independent read-only evaluator groups plus fresh-agent forward runs on sanitized fixtures.
evidence: audited all 12 public skills and their required references, scripts, metadata, and eval evidence
converted repository-specific paths, tools, branch names, docs owners, and product semantics into repository-discovered contracts
fixed every blocker found by independent evaluators rather than relying on the structural checker
persisted sanitized forward evidence for every public skill
reran structural, unit, integration, link, digest, and diff validation
